generate_file.py

Info

Defines domain models representing generated files.

class armpicom.model.generate_project.GeneratedProject(*, params: Mapping[str, Any])[source]¶

Bases: object

Domain model representing a generated file.

It defines:

attributes:
params - Mapping with parameters to fill the template.
methods:
check_parameters - Method that validates parameter values.
classmethod check_parameters(params: Mapping[str, Any]) → Self[source]¶

Method that validates parameter values.

Parameters:

params (<Mapping[str, Any]>) – Mapping with parameters to generate project.

Returns:

The generated project domain model instance.

Return type:

<GeneratedProject>

Exceptions:
ValueError: Parameters mapping must be provided.
TypeError: Parameters mapping must be a mapping.
params: Mapping[str, Any]¶
